summary.headline: Bunge extends exchange offers for its Viterra notes until February 3, 2025.
summary.narrative_summary: Bunge Limited Finance Corp. has extended the expiration date of its previously announced exchange offers and consent solicitations related to its Viterra notes.

ma_or_capital_allocation.description: Bunge Limited Finance Corp. has extended the expiration date of its exchange offers and consent solicitations related to its Viterra notes.

extraction_notes: Numbers from the filing; cover sheet only had Item references
